4ee7bd49-1b8e-4159-8b82-19c7f6146bb2.content: Please let me know if you have any troubles with these elements or if we need to reformat the various boards

9555446a-7bea-48d6-958d-8be6d5fa88ff.content: These description elements are just for story context and are not meant to be rendered.

0b290aa1-e77e-4392-8e4c-f826c9d67b27.title: Felipe Starting Element

22f88fea-8357-4bb3-9045-f79759693ebd.content: Hey, I'm just an old boatman talking your ear off. HA! Go, the villagers are expecting you. You don't want to be late for the Festa Junina.
22f88fea-8357-4bb3-9045-f79759693ebd.title: Finish talking

262c88d1-d917-4912-82ce-9c2f5acb312c.content: Ah, you must be the new preist whose come to our village. Another missionario catolico, come to spread the good news, no doubt. Tell me, have you not enough of a flock to tend to where you came from?
262c88d1-d917-4912-82ce-9c2f5acb312c.title: Dialogue Start

275afbc0-232c-4148-a57e-0852bcd1878d.content: For generations this was a prosperous fishing village. My grandfather would tell me tales of the bountiful fishing in the shadow of the great mountain. The boats they would use to bring the fish to town would nearly sink from the weight of all their catch! But now, the damned garimpeiros, the miners, have moved in and scared away all the fish!
275afbc0-232c-4148-a57e-0852bcd1878d.title: Ask about the village

33e78e37-f0e7-4548-919d-685b5173e161.content: Yes, Father! I apologize, I should have mentioned, the church and your quarters are still under repair right now. But not to worry, Father, it should be ready in no time! Until then, the village elder thought it would be best if you stayed with me! Is that alright with you Father?
33e78e37-f0e7-4548-919d-685b5173e161.title: Your home?

552153f1-8ba0-44d4-8ca4-cf495e5f9727.content: We used to be a prosperous fishing village. But ever since they found gold in the river - that's right, GOLD - well, no one cares too much about the fish. Especially me! I hate fish. It smells. But not everyone feels the same way. A few of the older villagers miss when we were just a simple fishing village. Before the miners showed up.
552153f1-8ba0-44d4-8ca4-cf495e5f9727.title: Village Information

5a0d2ebc-59b2-43b9-960e-06c46085aed2.content:
As your boat sails down the glassy surface of the Amazon, you take out the Archbishop's letter.

‘Father Francisco Xavier, your presence is required at the Diamente de Rio village. On behalf of the church, we task you with providing spiritual guidance to our flock there. Go with God’

You tuck the letter away and admire the scenery as a stunning pink dolphin crests the surface of the water next to your boat, as if welcoming you.
5a0d2ebc-59b2-43b9-960e-06c46085aed2.title: Game Start

89694351-3cd1-4e4c-a244-c855fefeb61b.content: Boa tarde! You must be Father Francisco! We are so honored to have a man of God with us again! The salvation of the village is in your hands! Our eternal souls are entrusted to you! The Devine Mercy of Jesus shines through your face!... Oh, hehe, forgive me Father, i should introduce myself. I am Felipe! The Village Elder entrusted your welcome to me!
89694351-3cd1-4e4c-a244-c855fefeb61b.title: Start

8aeb9035-b4e6-4bd8-89ca-a064c5d388be.content: The village is bright and lively. The various villagers gather to begin decorating for the upcoming festival.
8aeb9035-b4e6-4bd8-89ca-a064c5d388be.title: Evening Day 0

986d7094-994a-4323-911b-f4565582f7c6.content: Boa Tarde! Isn't it wonderful seeing the town square all c-colorful and beautiful like this?... Oh wait *hiccup* I don't know y-you... you must be...
986d7094-994a-4323-911b-f4565582f7c6.title: Dialogue Start

a4763617-fbe9-4330-8f36-a40d79caaf58.content: Welcome to Diamante de Rio! This village has lived in the shadow of the great river mountain for centuries. We are glad to finally have a priest again.
a4763617-fbe9-4330-8f36-a40d79caaf58.title: Start

a77af373-587a-4562-905d-1c100a157004.content: It's easy to get bored in the village. Maybe one day I'll move out of here, and it might pay to know something more than how to fish.
a77af373-587a-4562-905d-1c100a157004.title: You know alot

b4866df0-87e9-4878-b4bd-54b5846f1df4.content: Of course, Father! I mean, Father Francisco... I MEAN...
b4866df0-87e9-4878-b4bd-54b5846f1df4.title: Call me francisco.

cf116c30-31d9-4b06-a9bf-686266a9c57d.content: You saw that too? It is rare for an outsider to see such a good omen. Legends say much about the river spirits, but boto is not one to trifle with. He is said to bring guidance through the mazes of the river, but he can be a cunning and whily fellow.
cf116c30-31d9-4b06-a9bf-686266a9c57d.title: Ask about the Boto

d32a4b33-ec1b-47e3-b56e-1a558dff08fa.content:
Yeah, he's doesn't like the new industry around here. A bit of wet blanket if you ask me. Ha HA!

But it's a word for miners who ... don't have the proper authorization. They really shouldn't be here, but we're so out on our own out here, ther's really no one to stop them. Plus they sell it cheaper than the bigger mining operations.
d32a4b33-ec1b-47e3-b56e-1a558dff08fa.title: Garimpeiros?

ef6c6352-1b84-4430-acce-5855d60b933f.content: The honor and pleasure and joy is all mine, Father! Please, please, let me take your luggage and I will take you to my home! Let's get you settled in. I'm sure you've had a long journey.
ef6c6352-1b84-4430-acce-5855d60b933f.title: Thank you.

f72583f0-623b-43d7-89e3-e98b13573ade.content: I'm sure you will love it here! You got here just in time for the Festa Junina! The rest of the village should be gathering in the square soon! Let's drop off your bags and I'll take you there.
f72583f0-623b-43d7-89e3-e98b13573ade.title: Your home will do.

6a7ef118-2e38-473e-b6c2-9881e0c4056c.content: Hmm. Another lapdog of the archbishop, I see. When will the Church stop meddling in our affairs. Can we not be left alone?
6a7ef118-2e38-473e-b6c2-9881e0c4056c.title: Lapdog

ba89ab19-c31e-4042-8ea4-902d8efc284d.content: Let me give you some advice, priest. This village has sat beneath the river mountain for as long as memory can recall. The river itself is as old as the world. It's best for you to stay in your church. Do not meddle where you do not belong.
ba89ab19-c31e-4042-8ea4-902d8efc284d.title: Heed my warning.

ec5510e1-ec02-439b-b7e2-98dc614cdce9.content: Good. Follow in the footsteps of the last priest who was here long ago. He let the river and its people live in peace, and the river returned the favor. Take this lesson to heart.
ec5510e1-ec02-439b-b7e2-98dc614cdce9.title: Not a problem

63d4ecca-b4cb-439a-83e0-280187d10bd3.content: You have been warned. If you don't listen to my advice, the weight of those consequences fall onto you.
63d4ecca-b4cb-439a-83e0-280187d10bd3.title: Don't tell me what to do

055ad576-3412-4d8b-98e9-b36195303e72.content: Oh ssssshit! Forgive me, Father, I didn't know it was you. *Hiccup* I-I-I didn't know you were here already! P-please, meet my lovely *hiccup* wife Iara.
055ad576-3412-4d8b-98e9-b36195303e72.title: Uh oh

961fe682-c9ff-4d41-9d59-8a3c0b072e5a.content: IARA! Come here now and meet the nice p-p-p-priest!
961fe682-c9ff-4d41-9d59-8a3c0b072e5a.title: Meet my wife

e28086eb-7d82-496b-82d8-d0f26e043202.content: Boa Tarde, Father. I apologize for my husband's current condition. He likes to get... in the spirit for the festival.
e28086eb-7d82-496b-82d8-d0f26e043202.title: Iara

ac0397d3-272f-491d-a67d-2f898c17665b.content: My husband can be rough around the edges, but he's a good man. I hope he didn't offend you with his potty mouth!
ac0397d3-272f-491d-a67d-2f898c17665b.title: Harsh language

4afb52fe-3d44-495b-9e93-545426d86217.content:
You don't know about the festival? Surely they have something similar where you're from.

We celebrate the saints and the river spirits for giving us its life. The fish, the water, our livelihoods. It's all a blessing and a gift.
4afb52fe-3d44-495b-9e93-545426d86217.title: Festival Junina

a60b4e72-315a-465e-a7d7-1fc325ad6bc1.content: Surely you must know of it if you've spent time in Brazil?! It's a celebration of thanks to the Saints for another bountiful fishing season! Although, recently, the fishing hasn't been as good as years past... ever since the miners showed up.

821e85ae-40f1-4796-8756-58cd4d3d1622.content: A priest that was a sailor?! That is not something you hear of everyday! Tell me, how did this come about? How does one go from a life of excitement on the high seas to the simple life of the clergy?
821e85ae-40f1-4796-8756-58cd4d3d1622.title: A sailor?

44478d95-9931-46bf-a61d-f5800e942883.content: IARA! *HIccup* Can't you see you've perturbed our new priest? Be careful, we've already upset the r-river spirits. We don't need to piss off G-g-god!
44478d95-9931-46bf-a61d-f5800e942883.title: Husband barges back in.

07c8e997-fefd-4f95-9f6f-4af18c052969.content: The river spirits were soooo good to us *hiccup* before those damned miners showed up. Ever since then, we haven't caught nearly as many fish as we used to. It's a damn s-s-shame!
07c8e997-fefd-4f95-9f6f-4af18c052969.title: River spirits

1058d34e-af77-4eb7-acdf-8c636ed64292.label: Talk to Village Elder .

15f42f7d-7f81-4535-a9f2-ba48ec020795.label: Talk to Drunk Villager

32636703-f8f9-4dd0-8781-32c9283401dd.label: The ferryman referred to the miners as 'garimpeiros'?

be70b36a-9232-465a-94d4-d7f745bd5983.label: Talk to Aggravated Miner

b639f601-dbd2-4f43-81d3-5ca403ae1f33.label: I used to be a sailor, I'm used to it.

6d0bb1e2-20da-4792-9ed4-577105c85415.label: I haven't spent too much time in one place. I was a sailor.

value.data: A once prosperous fishing village deep on the Amazon river, Diamente de Rio is known for its towering monolith
